payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial/cropped dark brown stained-wood upper kitchen cabinet door with recessed paneling and a matte finish; vertical orientation, appears intact and sits above a stainless-steel microwave visible at the lower edge — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.
